description: False-colour satellite image displaying different land cover types in a European mountain region, dated 2011-08-27, from Spot 5 (2.5 m) imagery with a 1/2/3 band combination. The image highlights two areas of "Managed grassland" (labelled 4.1.0.0) with a red hue and outlined in green, situated adjacent to light-coloured roads. Surrounding these grasslands are other light green agricultural fields, and a darker, textured area with small white features indicating an urban or village infrastructure. The two classified grassland parcels appear to be distinct, relatively homogeneous areas within a mosaic landscape of agriculture and built-up land.
